title: No Chat Reports
description: This modpack (by jjws600) simply uses fabric and mods to remove the 1.19+ chat reporting features.
body:
![Modpack logo, microsoft logo behind grass block - prohibited symbol over front](https://jjws.link/no-chat-reporting-modpack/logo.png)

**No Chat Reports / Telemetry** is a modpack created by **jjws600** intended to be a lightweight way to remove the signing of messages that are sent in 22w17a (1.19) and later, which can cause you to be banned from the whole of multiplayer.

It also removes the chat bars that were added to show system messages and unsigned messages unfavorably.

The mod-pack runs on fabric (lightweight mod loader) and is available for most mod-pack platforms

It only adds four mods, and is intended not to be a quality of life mod-pack. 
It's only purpose is in the name, removing the chat bars, chat signing and telemetry;

* Fabric API
* No Bar
* No Chat Reports
* Mod Menu

Visit the full modpack web-page: [No Chat Reporting / Telemetry Modpack](https://jjws.link/no-chat-reporting-modpack/)
